name: Booker HQ
subject: Will you host a debate watch party?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, We're just 16 days from the DNC's first debate in Miami. This will be the first time all the candidates bring their ideas to the national stage, including Cory. The momentum of this campaign continues to grow across the country. We saw it yesterday in Iowa, where thousands of supporters showed up to support Cory at the Iowa Democratic Party's Hall of Fame dinner. That's why we want you to join in by hosting a debate watch party to cheer Cory on with supporters in your community. [_**Can you host a debate watch party to support Cory on debate night?**_](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0903/5fca0d19/5506bda/291bac29/1936995189/VEsH/ "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/host-debate-watch-party?source=em_20190610") [_**Don 't worry if you can't host, you can sign up to attend a party happening in your area >>**_](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0903/5fca0d19/5506bda/291bac28/1936995189/VEsE/ "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/attend-debate-watch-party?source=em_20190610") Hosting a debate watch party is a great way to elevate your support and meet members of our team in your own neighborhood. And don't worry! Our team will give you everything you need to succeed including a Cory 2020 swag pack, planning calls, and opportunities to join our exclusive online community. [_**Will you step up and host a debate watch party?**_](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0903/5fca0d19/5506bda/291bac37/1936995189/VEsF/ "http://act.corybooker.com/page/s/host-debate-watch-party?source=em_20190610") [_**If not, will you attend a watch party in your neighborhood?**_](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0903/5fca0d19/5506bda/291bac36/1936995189/VEsC/ "http://act.corybooker.com/page/s/attend-debate-watch-party?source=em_20190610") Thanks, Team Cory

name: Brandon Beach
subject: Washington is Broken
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beach for Congress |
body:
---
| |
---|---|---
| Peter, Washington politicians are up to their same old tricks -- and I am sick of it. Lucy McBath has been in Washington for six months and hasn’t accomplished anything for the people of the 6th district. She’s passed ZERO bills and [couldn’t even setup her constituent services.](https://brandonbeach.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jiidlkky-udyuidthb-y/) You see, Lucy thinks she deserves a pay increase (funded by taxpayers like you and me) despite doing absolutely nothing since being elected. Is that what she was sent to Washington to do? Unlike Lucy, I have served Georgia here on the ground, and I know what it takes to get things done. We oversaw the largest income tax cut in state history, helping to create 750,000+ jobs for Georgians. I understand what businesses and families need in our state. That is why I am running for Congress. **[Can I count on your support to help us retire Lucy McBath? ](https://brandonbeach.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jiidlkky-udyuidthb-j/)** Instead of another taxpayer funded pay raise, our campaign is setting up a fund to help give Lucy the pink slip -- [**will you chip in $5 today?**](https://brandonbeach.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jiidlkky-udyuidthb-t/) Together, we will work to make Georgia the best place to do business and to raise a family. It's time to end Washington gridlock and send someone with bold solutions to Washington. Thank you, Brandon |

body:
Help make President Trump’s birthday special. |

Friend,

My father has spent the last two and a half years working tirelessly to Make America Great Again.

His birthday is coming up on June 14, and we're putting together a birthday card with signatures from all of his loyal supporters.

Our goal is to collect 2 MILLION signatures from Trump supporters like you to help wish my father a happy birthday.

**[Add your name to the Official President Trump Birthday Card TODAY to help us reach our goal of 2 million signatures.>>](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=a3650e7120dd6f2a017b63a980491fc381a9cf505477b77e1c274426862cf80d0c86fd9160d96339c61eb0cfdb61628f1b3582933b98111a)**

This card is the perfect opportunity for all of us to show our appreciation for all that President Trump has done for our country.

Hurry, we only have 3 days left to reach our goal of 2 million signatures.

**[Please add your name to the Official President Trump Birthday Card immediately to make sure my father sees your name on his card.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=a3650e7120dd6f2a4b36b6c71875fab3128582beea780a5ba73a59f8b64dc0fd8d1d0eec11892c9bfe89135a384ee7778fa6dceb3d1c8828)**

name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: The real battle will not be on Election Day in 2020
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Please bear with me, this email is a little long. But if you don't have the time to read it all, please know that we need your help in 2019, because if we don't do our work this year, 2020 might be too late. [We can win this battle, but we need your help today. Please chip in now to help us stay on track >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/FH-Dz6orZSSRAuR5oW265suBF1BnO4XsV7gf-v9Lqe8=/c4PHQS22Q16-cp4Li_eAdK0-kHGfSfYuAioqts8Mu48=?refcode=0611battleground) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/FH-Dz6orZSSRAuR5oW265suBF1BnO4XsV7gf-v9Lqe8=/c4PHQS22Q16-cp4Li_eAdK0-kHGfSfYuAioqts8Mu48=?refcode=0611battleground)
---

Team, Election Day isn't until November 2020. But the real fight is happening right now. Last November, we had the highest turnout ever for a midterm. We got 37,000 new people to come out who had not even voted in the Presidential election, and we closed what was a 35% gap in the last midterm down to a 4.9% margin on Election Day. But that's not the whole story.

On Election Day, 68,000 people - likely Democratic voters - didn't vote! Our margin of defeat was only 14,000 votes. In other words, we had the votes to win, but too many of our voters stayed on the sidelines.

This year, the Texas Secretary of State (who has since resigned over the scandal) tried to remove almost 100,000 U.S. citizens from the voting rolls, simply because they were immigrants who had naturalized within the last 20 years. Moreover, we found out from emails released this week that Governor Abbott knew about it and was likely involved in this effort to stifle our constitutional right to be heard at the ballot box.

This is part of a pattern across Texas and the country. At Prairie View A&M (a historically black university), early voting was limited to 3 days instead of the 2 weeks in other precincts. In North Dakota, Republicans passed a law which disproportionately restricted Native Americans from voting. In Georgia, the Secretary of State (who was also the Republican candidate for Governor) purged over 600,000 people in a single year (more than 10% of all voters, and disproportionately African-American). That election was decided by less than 55,000 votes.

Friends, this is the real battle. The GOP knows it is losing ground in states like Texas. Pete Olson himself said last year that if Fort Bend County goes blue then "we may lose Texas, and if we lose Texas we may never have a man like Trump in the White House again."

They realize they are in danger of losing Texas, because today's Republican party does not represent the majority of citizens here. So, they are trying to change the rules of the game. They are trying to ensure FEWER people vote.

This is why we need your help, not in 2020, but right now in 2019. We are attempting to register the most people ever in Texas history. But, we are fighting an uphill battle against people who don't want us all to vote. We need the resources for this fight. We need your help now. [**Help us keep building our movement by chipping in to our campaign today.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/FH-Dz6orZSSRAuR5oW265suBF1BnO4XsV7gf-v9Lqe8=/c4PHQS22Q16-cp4Li_eAdK0-kHGfSfYuAioqts8Mu48=?refcode=0611battleground)

**[I know we can do this. Will you help us make it happen and chip in today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/FH-Dz6orZSSRAuR5oW265suBF1BnO4XsV7gf-v9Lqe8=/c4PHQS22Q16-cp4Li_eAdK0-kHGfSfYuAioqts8Mu48=?refcode=0611battleground)**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/FH-Dz6orZSSRAuR5oW265suBF1BnO4XsV7gf-v9Lqe8=/c4PHQS22Q16-cp4Li_eAdK0-kHGfSfYuAioqts8Mu48=?refcode=0611battleground)

"A man without a vote is a man without protection." -Lyndon Baines Johnson

Thank you,

Sri Preston Kulkarni

**STAY TUNED WITH OUR MOVEMENT!**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/FH-Dz6orZSSRAuR5oW265suBF1BnO4XsV7gf-v9Lqe8=/vTqvkva6fjULjuBgESnYCevZJGs1HnvraPcomBFM01E=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/FH-Dz6orZSSRAuR5oW265suBF1BnO4XsV7gf-v9Lqe8=/AlkJY2GvK4n3HmHMUFxB4gGTEm7ffRDoopTYe4Q57y0=)

They realize they are in danger of losing Texas, because today's Republican party does not represent the majority of citizens here. So, they are trying to change the rules of the game. They are trying to ensure FEWER people vote. This is why we need your help, not in 2020, but right now in 2019. We are attempting to register the most people ever in Texas history. But, we are fighting an uphill battle against people who don't want us all to vote. We need the resources for this fight. We need your help now. "A man without a vote is a man without protection." -Lyndon Baines Johnson Thank you, Sri Preston Kulkarni STAY TUNED WITH OUR MOVEMENT! = = * Paid for by Sri for Congress. Our campaign is only possible because of grassroots donors.

**Elizabeth doesn 't raise money from wealthy donors at private fundraising events.** That's why she's had time to host town halls in 20 states and Puerto Rico this year -- taking hundreds of questions and over 25,000 selfies.

**Elizabeth doesn 't take a dime from federal lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind.

That's how you know she's fighting for you -- not powerful special interests.** Elizabeth has a plan to make Washington work for everyone, not just the rich and powerful, and it starts with grassroots donors building our movement.

name: Cory Booker
subject: It would be an honor if I could count you as a founder of this campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, After tomorrow night, we turn over our donor numbers to the DNC to make sure we qualify for the first debate. Those numbers will be a snapshot of who was here from the start -- the founders helping build this grassroots campaign. [_**It would be an honor if I could count you among those founding donors of our campaign.**_](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0902/5fca0d19/544f46f/291bab4a/1158668802/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190611-em?refcode=em_fr_20190611_CB_20190611-fr-CB-fnddnr-2020ndnr_2020ndnr_l1") This is about more than the dollars brought in (although that's important, too). Under the DNC rules, making a donation is a symbolic statement that you think our voice belongs in the debates. I know most people aren't ready to make up their minds on who to vote for in this primary race -- there's a lot of time left to decide. But that's also why it means so much to know you believe I should be part of the conversation. The truth is we're still a long way from having the 130,000 donors required to secure a spot in future debates. Every donation gets us closer, even if you only give a buck. [_**Will you make a donation to be a founder of this campaign before we report our numbers to the DNC?**_](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0902/5fca0d19/544f46f/291bab49/1158668802/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190611-em?refcode=em_fr_20190611_CB_20190611-fr-CB-fnddnr-2020ndnr_2020ndnr_l2") Thank you, Cory P.S. Here's a bonus: [_**Every donation before tomorrow night automatically enters you for a chance to win two tickets to the first debate in Miami.**_](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0902/5fca0d19/544f46f/291bab48/1158668802/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190611-em?refcode=em_fr_20190611_CB_20190611-fr-CB-fnddnr-2020ndnr_2020ndnr_l3") You pick your guest, and we'll fly you both in and put you up for the night so you can be there in person to witness one of the biggest moments of this election. _No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to enter or win and will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by June 13, 2019. Enter by contributing[here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0902/5fca0d19/544f46f/291bab57/1158668802/VEsC/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-debatecontest?refcode=em_fr_20190611_CB_20190611-fr-CB-fnddnr-2020ndnr_2020ndnr_disclaimer") or fill out the form [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0902/5fca0d19/544f46f/291bab56/1158668802/VEsD/ "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/Debate-Contest?source=em_disclaimer") to enter without contributing. One (1) winner will receive the following prize package: round-trip tickets for winner and one guest from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to Miami, Florida; one night hotel accommodations for winner and one guest; opportunity to attend the first DNC Presidential Debate (approx. retail value $3,000). Odds depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). View full official rules [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0902/5fca0d19/544f46f/291bab55/1158668802/VEsA/ "https://corybooker.com/dncdebatecontest"). Sponsor: Cory 2020, PO Box 32009, Newark, NJ 07102._

| | We believe that the majority of Mississippians desire a more transparent, efficient and accountable government. Our office is committed to working towards ensuring that all Mississippians have access to those things. This is why using the findings and recommendations from this briefing, we have created the Transparent, Efficient and Accountable Mississippi (T.E.A.M.) Initiative. T.E.A.M. is designed to help increase government oversight, promote transparency, increase government efficiency and accountability in the Mississippi Legislature.

name: Wilmot Collins
subject: Health care is a human right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
body:
#
Friend,
Health care is a right for all, not a luxury for the few.
It is never acceptable to force a young mother to make the choice between paying the bills and taking her child to a doctor. No one should ever have to declare bankruptcy because they got sick.
**[I'm running for Senate because Montana needs a champion who will fight to uphold our fundamental right to affordable health care. Sign on right now to join me in this fight.](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/5616471e/1e3760f0/69bf437b/5f7eb77e/3885632265/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://wilmotcollins.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/health-care-is-a-human-right?source=em190611&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=")**
My opponent, Steve Daines, is in lock step with Mitch McConnell's GOP in their efforts to rip away health coverage for millions of Americans, including those with pre-existing conditions. If Mitch McConnell can buy victory for Daines in 2020, Montana's families will be the ones left paying the price for insulin, cancer treatments, contraception, preventative care and more!
Join me and let's make our voices heard loud and clear: health care is a human right.

name: Courtney Whitney
subject: what it means
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Florida Action,
body:
Did you see Andrew's message?
Hey --

Just wanted to make sure you saw Andrew's message about the surge of enthusiasm we saw over the weekend. At event after event, hundreds of Democrats showed up to support Andrew's mission to register and reengage a million voters in Florida and to defeat Donald Trump in 2020.

**People are fired up and ready to put in the work to turn our mission into a reality. But the only way we can flip Florida blue and defeat Trump is with the help of committed supporters like you.**

That's why I'm asking if you can donate today, so we can double down on this incredible enthusiasm to defeat Trump. Use this link to invest in the future our nation: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fwd-fla-action](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3584/9e00690/6a0d16f8/2407655a/2693955753/VEsH/p/eyJKU1Z6YjNWeVkyVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fwd-fla-action?refcode=&amount=5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1+-+httpssecureactbluecomdonatefwdflaaction&utm_campaign=061119-es-surge-kicker-fr&source=061119-es-surge-kicker-fr")**

Any amount you can contribute goes a long way to helping us reach our goal to register and reengage a million voters, and we are forever grateful for your support.

Thank you,

Courtney Whitney
Finance Director
Forward Florida Action

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Andrew Gillum**
Date: Mon, Jun 10, 2019 at 11:46 AM
Subject: you can feel it in the air

[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3584/9e00690/6a0d16f8/2407655d/2693955753/VEsE/p/eyJKU1Z6YjNWeVkyVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fwd-fla-action?refcode=-em-header-logo&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=061119-es-surge-kicker-fr&source=061119-es-surge-kicker-fr") You could feel the excitement in the air this past weekend when I visited the fine folks of the Villages and fired up Democrats from across the state during the Florida Democratic Party's Leadership Blue weekend.

While people may have different ideas about how we move the ball down the court, one theme was echoed by everyone I had the pleasure of meeting and talking with: the only way we can move Florida and our nation forward is by working together.
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3584/9e00690/6a0d16f8/2407655c/2693955753/VEsF/ "https://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/forward?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=061119-es-surge-kicker-fr&source=061119-es-surge-kicker-fr")

_This packed room of Democrats in the Republican stronghold of the VIllages are fired up and more motivated than ever to help turn Florida blue, and defeat Donald Trump in 2020._
Everyone I spoke with knows how much is at stake in this election, and that we simply can't afford to have Donald Trump in the White House for four more years. So much damage has already been done it will take years to clean up, and we must work together to ensure he spends the rest of his days on the golf course, not continuing to play games with our future.

**There's only one way we can do that, team.**

**[We've got to put in the work to register and reengage a million voters in Florida. That's how we turn Florida blue and defeat Donald Trump in 2020, and I hope you will join me on this mission.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3584/9e00690/6a0d16f8/2407655f/2693955753/VEsC/ "https://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/forward?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=4+-+Weve+got+to+put+in+the+work+to+register+&utm_campaign=061119-es-surge-kicker-fr&source=061119-es-surge-kicker-fr")**

[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3584/9e00690/6a0d16f8/2407655e/2693955753/VEsD/ "https://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/forward?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=061119-es-surge-kicker-fr&source=061119-es-surge-kicker-fr")

_The energy from folks all across the state who came to Orlando this past weekend for the Florida Democratic Party's Leadership Blue event was inspiring, and this energy is going to lift us to victory._
We are going to give people hope who have lost it along the way. We are going to give people who don't believe in voting the faith that their voice is powerful. We are going to reach out to folks who think that no one is looking out for them and tell them that we are, and we are fighting for them.

[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3584/9e00690/6a0d16f8/24076551/2693955753/VEsA/ "https://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/forward?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=061119-es-surge-kicker-fr&source=061119-es-surge-kicker-fr")

_Florida Democrats at Leadership Blue are fired up and ready to flip Florida blue._
**[I'll take the arrows, the name-calling, and all the attacks they throw at us - as long as I know you are with me to organize this state, turn out our voters, and committed to helping move our nation forward.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3584/9e00690/6a0d16f8/24076550/2693955753/VEsB/ "https://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/forward?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=7+-+Ill+take+the+arrows+the+namecalling+and+&utm_campaign=061119-es-surge-kicker-fr&source=061119-es-surge-kicker-fr")**

There is no doubt that powerful people and outside groups want to stop us, but we're not going to let them.

We're going to flip Florida blue and our nation blue, because if we're in this together, there's nothing that will stop us.

Forward.

Andrew Gillum

[ADD YOUR NAME](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3584/9e00690/6a0d16f8/24076553/2693955753/VEsO/ "https://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/forward?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=8+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=061119-es-surge-kicker-fr&source=061119-es-surge-kicker-fr")

Forward Florida Action's mission is to educate the public on progressive policy solutions and to increase voter registration and voter participation in Florida.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Forward Florida Action. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, and we'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3584/9e00690/6a0d16f8/24076555/2693955753/VEsHBQ/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=10+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=061119-es-surge-kicker-fr&source=061119-es-surge-kicker-fr").

disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/WNpk89_wmBXqL-65wWX34rHaw7mQ064TcygIFPv--Is=/_l0moznFjBvO5MuALHQpyvl50Cepg9uKWGsbBVNZ-2I=)
Peter,

This week we celebrate the 56th anniversary of the Equal Pay Act, an important step forward in the fight for gender equality. But today, the gender pay gap still exists and has even worsened in recent years.

I was proud to be an original co-sponsor of this year's Paycheck Fairness Act, aimed at closing loopholes in the original Equal Pay Act.

[**_The Senate has stalled on this critical legislation. In honor of this week 's anniversary, I'm asking 2,000 supporters to sign on and demand equal pay once and for all:_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/WNpk89_wmBXqL-65wWX34rHaw7mQ064TcygIFPv--Is=/_l0moznFjBvO5MuALHQpyvl50Cepg9uKWGsbBVNZ-2I=)

---
Women are too often shortchanged for the work they do. We must step up and keep fighting until equal pay for equal work is a reality.

[**_Add your name to demand the Senate pass pay equity._**](https://act.myngp.com/el/WNpk89_wmBXqL-65wWX34rHaw7mQ064TcygIFPv--Is=/_l0moznFjBvO5MuALHQpyvl50Cepg9uKWGsbBVNZ-2I=)

Mike

name: James Mackler
subject: What drives me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
A sense of duty compelled me to join the U.S. Army after we were attacked on 9/11. I knew I had to do more to serve our country.
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa2b2/18d6a294/4a06ff6a/26d689d9/3718089840/VEsH/ "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | Friend, A sense of duty compelled me to join the U.S. Army after we were attacked on 9/11. I knew I had to do more to serve our country. As 30-year-old attorney, I closed my law practice, volunteered, earned an age waiver and learned to fly Black Hawk helicopters, and became a _Screaming Eagle_ serving in the 101st Airborne Division. In Iraq, I saw what happens when the rule of law breaks down. Today, with our own rule of law under siege, that same sense of duty compels me to run for U.S. Senate. I need to do more to change a broken political system that fosters divisions and rewards conflict. Compromise - even with the opioid epidemic and a steady stream of rural hospital closures - isn't happening. Our system works best when people vote, volunteer, and make their voices heard. When our voices are drowned out by floods of corporate cash, we all suffer. **Change starts with me, and that 's why my campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC contributions.** This effort is and will continue to be, fueled by individuals wanting to fix a system that's been rigged against us. [**_If you are able, please make a $5 investment in this country 's future._**](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa2b2/18d6a294/4a06ff6a/26d689c6/3718089840/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jme190607?refcode=jme190607_m&recurring=true") | | | [Donate](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa2b2/18d6a294/4a06ff6a/26d689c6/3718089840/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jme190607?refcode=jme190607_m&recurring=true")
---
I know we can make a difference together.
James

|

body:
The largest voting rights protection and campaign finance reform bill we've seen in years.

Voter ID laws, purges of voter rolls, gerrymandering, soliciting money from dark money donors. They'll do anything they can to stay in power. **Tina believes our democracy works best when every eligible citizen participates. That 's why she's backing H.R. 1 -- the largest voting rights protection and campaign finance reform bill we've seen in years.** H.R. 1 makes it easier for people to vote by expanding early and absentee voting. And it reduces the role of money in politics to restore transparency and accountability to government. **The U.S. House passed this legislation back in March. But Mitch McConnell refuses to call a vote because he knows it 'll weaken the tactics he and the GOP have used to stay in power for decades.** **[Friend, will you join Tina in fighting for fair elections by demanding McConnell bring H.R. 1 to the Senate floor? body:
Things could have been different. If Mitch McConnell hadn't stolen a Supreme Court seat when President Obama duly nominated Merrick Garland in 2016...
|
---

| | **Mitch McConnell just admitted that he would rush to confirm a Trump nominee to the Supreme Court in 2020 -- after refusing to grant a vote to President Obama 's nominee and effectively stealing a Supreme Court seat in 2016! [Fight back with $19 to elect Dan in must-win Colorado, oust McConnell for good, and restore our progress. >>](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb82632/232dfd1/9510e1d/62a17203/750318297/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190611_em_fr_b1_action_all&amount=19&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** Things could have been different.

\-- Roe v. Wade wouldn't be under attack across our country

\-- States wouldn't be purging their voter rolls and stripping Americans of their Constitutional right to vote

\-- Immigrants held in detention facilities, often for years at a time, would have their right to hearings upheld

subject: No more double standards...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaTurner for Senate
body:
Americans everywhere live on a budget, it's time the federal government does too! | | |
# Double standards don't belong in Washington
---
| | Kansas families know the importance of living within their means. Suzanne and I have four children and we understand the importance of kitchen table budgeting. Managing a fiscally responsible household is **tough** but it’s what responsible people do.

The Federal government, on the other hand, has decided that because something is **tough** it’s easier to not even try. This kick the can down the road mentality has resulted in a National Federal debt of $22+ trillion. If American families are expected to budget responsibly then so should D.C. This double standard must end!

[That's why I signed the No Tax Pledge.](https://laturnerforsenate.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=66e1e33aabb963218c502c41e&id=45916fc701&e=6882b657f8)
---
| [ ](https://laturnerforsenate.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=66e1e33aabb963218c502c41e&id=e6103d1868&e=6882b657f8)
---
| I will not vote for a budget without a plan to reduce our debt. The Trump tax-cuts are working, and we do not need a tax increase.

As your Senator, you can expect to see me operate with Kansas practicality and fiscal responsibility in Washington.

You can read about this and my six other non-negotiable commitments to you, in my [Contract with Kansas](https://laturnerforsenate.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=66e1e33aabb963218c502c41e&id=bd2af6ea9e&e=6882b657f8).

When I get to D.C., I plan to get right to work. If you have also had enough of seeing our federal government continue to overspend, I need your help to with a [donation to my campaign for U.S. Senate.](https://laturnerforsenate.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=66e1e33aabb963218c502c41e&id=e08059fd3b&e=6882b657f8) There's no more time to waste on this important issue.

Your donation does make a difference. [Click here to donate $100, $50 or even $5 to Jake LaTurner for Senate. Let's tell our elected officials that if responsible Kansans can live on a budget, so can the federal government!](https://laturnerforsenate.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=66e1e33aabb963218c502c41e&id=be9f9258bb&e=6882b657f8)

name: Richard Rodriguez, Our Revolution
subject: We must end the DCCC Blacklist to win Medicare for All
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
Our mission is to elect progressive candidates who support Medicare for All.
# [](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a4be/bed43eb/93d18150/75fac5a3/3420737465/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-header-OR")
Friends,
Our mission is to elect progressive candidates who support Medicare for All. 82% of grassroots Democrats support it, but that isn't reflected among our elected leaders in Congress. Only 114 House Democrats -- less than 50% of the 235 elected last fall -- support Pramila Jayapal's Medicare for All bill.
**There is no better example of why we need to end the DCCC Blacklist than the fight to win Medicare for All and that 's why our ambulance visited the office of DCCC Cheri Bustos in Rock Island, IL yesterday. **Dozens of Our Revolution members occupied her office to demand that she end the DCCC Blacklist and that she sign on as a co-sponsor of the Medicare for All Act of 2019. The office could not commit to either.
[_**The DCCC Blacklist is protecting House Democrats even if their policy positions are out of touch with their constituents. Will you add your name to our Blacklist petition to help us fight back?**_](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a4be/bed43eb/93d18150/75fac5a2/3420737465/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/dccc-primary-blacklist")
Democrats have a large majority in the House of Representatives. We _should_ be able to pass Medicare for All. But party leaders aren't siding with us. This weekend, Rep. Sean Casten was met at the Aurora Pride Parade by health care advocates calling on him to support Medicare for All. He deferred.
**Perhaps no other issue brings the divide within the Democratic Party into such stark relief as health care.** There is a divide between the grassroots base and party leaders who have enacted a DCCC Blacklist to protect their incumbents. They should allow progressive candidates to mount primary challenges against Democrats -- like Rep. Casten -- who don't support progressive policies like Medicare for All.
Democrats have a large majority in the House of Representatives. We should be able to pass Medicare for All. But party leaders aren't siding with us. This weekend, Rep. Sean Casten was met at the Aurora Pride Parade by health care advocates calling on him to support Medicare for All. He deferred.
We delivered 35,000 petitions directly to Rep. Cheri Bustos in April demanding she ends the Blacklist. She agreed to a follow-up meeting with DCCC staff, but has yet to set it up.
[_**The DCCC isn 't going to change without pressure -- that's why we need to keep building this movement. Will you add your name to the DCCC Blacklist petition to help us end the Blacklist so we can continue to elect progressives who support for Medicare for All?**_](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a4be/bed43eb/93d18150/75fac5a2/3420737465/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/dccc-primary-blacklist")
The fight to win Medicare for All will define the Democratic Party. Thank you for being on the people's side.

In Solidarity,
Richard Rodriguez
Board Member
Our Revolution

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: I am writing to ask you to make a $3 contribution to our campaign. Over the weekend, news broke that the Koch brothers are ready to start spending money on DEMOCRATIC primaries. We cannot let them buy another major political party.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020
body:
That is not democracy. That is oligarchy.

# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1668%2E150750%2EbSOez7)
Friends -
Over the weekend, news broke: the **_Koch brothers**_ are ready to start spending their obscene wealth supporting certain Democratic candidates running in contested primaries.
Now, you would think that having already bought up the entire Republican Party, that they might be satisfied. But apparently that is not the case. They will not be satisfied until they have bought BOTH major parties.
That is not democracy. That is oligarchy. And we cannot let it happen:
[**Make a $3 contribution to our campaign as a way of saying there is NO WAY we are going to let the Koch brothers start buying up Democratic candidates and the 2020 campaign.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/14403?refcode=em190611-1-60&t=26&akid=1668%2E150750%2EbSOez7)
This isn't personal for me. I don't know the Koch brothers, but I do know this: one of the most significant realities of modern politics is just how successful they have been at moving the Republican Party to the extreme right.
Now they will try to move the Democratic Party even further to the right.
And the only way to stop them is to build a grassroots progressive campaign that rejects their right-wing ideology.
That is what we are doing on this campaign. But I cannot do it alone:
**Please make a $3 contribution ahead of our critical FEC fundraising deadline.**
[**https://act.berniesanders.com/go/koch-brothers](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/14403?refcode=em190611-1-60&t=27&akid=1668%2E150750%2EbSOez7)**
Our vision for American democracy should be a nation in which all people, regardless of their income, can participate in the political process and can run for office without begging for contributions from the wealthy and the powerful.
We are proving that is possible through this campaign.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

body:
Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump met with a group of bipartisan lawmakers on Capitol Hill today, previewing a new initiative. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2e87bfd008&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • June 11, 2019
---
| | |
# **Ivanka Trump is fighting to get women a seat at the table across the globe**

**Advisor to the President** Ivanka Trump met with a group of bipartisan lawmakers on Capitol Hill today, previewing a new initiative from the Trump Administration to boost the role that women play in global peace and security processes.

**When women are involved** in peace negotiations, important issues that help societies recover from conflict are more likely to be considered. In fact, research shows that peace agreements have a better chance of succeeding if women participate. Societies that empower women economically and politically are also more stable and peaceful, while those that marginalize women are likelier to experience regular conflict.

**President Donald J. Trump** believes in policymaking that gets real-world results. His Administration’s new plan—the Strategy on Women, Peace, and Security—will help enhance women’s participation in resolving conflict, countering violent extremism, and building peace and stability. It's both a moral imperative and smart foreign policy.

**The new strategy** implements the Women, Peace, and Security Act signed by the President in 2017. President Trump was the first world leader to sign standalone legislation on the topic—making the United States the first country in the world with a comprehensive law addressing women, peace, and security.

**That effort coincides** with work already underway by the Trump Administration to empower women and girls across the globe. In February, the President signed a memorandum launching [W-GDP](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8b879b1561&e=3ee4985eea), an initiative led by Ivanka Trump that seeks to empower 50 million women economically across the developing world by 2025.

[How President Trump is supporting women’s political empowerment globally](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=65f2652e85&e=3ee4985eea)

**_The Wall Street Journal_ :** [Ivanka Trump Pushes Initiative to Give Women Bigger Role in Global Peace Efforts](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0c06e3510a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Getting Washington out of the way for farmers**

**In Iowa earlier today,** President Trump signed an executive order that will lift a major regulatory burden off of America’s farming community.

**Biotechnology** has been used by our farmers for decades to produce safer, more sustainable crops. But Washington often has a way of making things more difficult than they should be. For years, agricultural innovators have been shackled with a regulatory maze that can take more than a decade to navigate. Far removed from America's heartland, politicians like to tack on regulation with little regard for the hidden costs.

**Effective immediately,** President Trump’s executive order will direct the U.S. Department of Agriculture to streamline the entire biotechnology approval process—giving our farmers much-needed certainty about the important work they do.

[Watch President Trump discuss renewable energy in Iowa.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6aec41e003&e=3ee4985eea)

**More welcome news:** [The Trump Administration approves year-round sales of E15](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3de36bfb05&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---

## **Video of the day: The 2019 Indy 500 winner**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=394d4cfbf1&e=3ee4985eea)

| **Yesterday,** President Trump welcomed Indianapolis 500 winner Simon Pagenaud to the White House. Last month, Simon became the 103rd champion of the historic race.

**With the No. 22 Indy car** parked on the South Lawn, President Trump congratulated Pagenaud along with Team Penske. “The job that Simon did, if you saw that—that was talent and it was a lot of courage,” the President said.

clean_body: Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump met with a group of bipartisan lawmakers on Capitol Hill today, previewing a new initiative. | | | | | The White House • June 11, 2019 | | | Ivanka Trump is fighting to get women a seat at the table across the globe Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump met with a group of bipartisan lawmakers on Capitol Hill today, previewing a new initiative from the Trump Administration to boost the role that women play in global peace and security processes. When women are involved in peace negotiations, important issues that help societies recover from conflict are more likely to be considered. In fact, research shows that peace agreements have a better chance of succeeding if women participate. Societies that empower women economically and politically are also more stable and peaceful, while those that marginalize women are likelier to experience regular conflict. President Donald J. Trump believes in policymaking that gets real-world results. His Administration’s new plan—the Strategy on Women, Peace, and Security—will help enhance women’s participation in resolving conflict, countering violent extremism, and building peace and stability. It's both a moral imperative and smart foreign policy. The new strategy implements the Women, Peace, and Security Act signed by the President in 2017. President Trump was the first world leader to sign standalone legislation on the topic—making the United States the first country in the world with a comprehensive law addressing women, peace, and security. That effort coincides with work already underway by the Trump Administration to empower women and girls across the globe. In February, the President signed a memorandum launching , an initiative led by Ivanka Trump that seeks to empower 50 million women economically across the developing world by 2025. The Wall Street Journal : | | Getting Washington out of the way for farmers In Iowa earlier today, President Trump signed an executive order that will lift a major regulatory burden off of America’s farming community. Biotechnology has been used by our farmers for decades to produce safer, more sustainable crops. But Washington often has a way of making things more difficult than they should be. For years, agricultural innovators have been shackled with a regulatory maze that can take more than a decade to navigate. Far removed from America's heartland, politicians like to tack on regulation with little regard for the hidden costs. Effective immediately, President Trump’s executive order will direct the U.S. Department of Agriculture to streamline the entire biotechnology approval process—giving our farmers much-needed certainty about the important work they do.
